# mds-spinner

## CSS Custom Properties

| Name           | Description                                |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------ |
| `--background` | Sets the background-color of the component |
| `--color`      | Sets the color of the icon                 |
| `--duration`   | Sets the duration of the icon animation    |
| `--size`       | Sets the size of the component             |
